title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 14 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/03/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.22% today, the main contract closed at 920.The traders' willingness to ship is more.The steel mills aremore active to purchase.The overall trading sentement of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 933-940 yuan/mt, increase 2-15yuan/mt. PBF at Tangshan port deal 945-950 yuan/mt,decrease 2-5 yuan/mt.
